tapps-mcp.instructions: Code quality scoring (0-100 across 7 categories), security scanning (Bandit + secret detection), quality gates (pass/fail against configurable presets), documentation lookup, domain expert consultation, and project profiling for Python projects.

context7.instructions: Look up library documentation with version-specific context. Use before writing code that calls external library APIs.

docs-mcp.instructions: Documentation audit and generation. 14 tools: project scan, drift/completeness/freshness checks, and generators for README, CHANGELOG, API docs, CONTRIBUTING, onboarding, epics, stories, PRDs, ADRs, and diagrams.
